info.english_meaning: to liveto reviveto live upon to survive

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'saYjIvAH sTa saYjIvyAsam' (aTarva॰19.70.3) saYjIvAH samyagjIvantaH jIvanakAla ekaH kzaRo vEyarTyena na nIyate yaste (sAyaRaH)
'tena saYjIvatu mama priyA' (BA॰Adi॰9.4) punaH prARAnDArayatvityAha
'tavAmftarasapraKyaM hastasparSamimaM praBo labDvA saYjIvito'smIti manye kurukulodvaha' (BA॰ASrama॰3.73) ukto'rTaH
'yasyE nikramaRe GftaM prajAH saMjIvantIH pibanti' (tE0 saM0 172) saMjIvantIH saMjIvantya upajIvantyaH
'AjIvyaH sarvaBUtAnAm brahmavfkzaH sanAtanaH' (BA0 ASva0 4714) AjIvya ASreyaH
'nihatAnnihatAn dEtyAnAjIvayati' (mAtsyapu0 13715) AjIvayati saMjIvayati
'atijIvetsa sarvezu lokezvapi purandarAt' (rA0 33419) atijIvet tato'DikaM jIvet cirajIvitataraH syAt
'gurUnamAtyAMSca nAtijIvet' (Apa0 Da0 2102510) BakzyaBojyAcCAdanAdizu tAn nAtiSayItetyAha tatopyutkfzwamulbaRataraM na jIvediti BAvaH
'atyajIvadamarAlakeSvarO' (raGu0 1915) ukto'rTaH
'udajIvat sumitrABUH' (Bawwi0 1795) udajIvat samajIvat punaH prARAnApadyata
'yasya sItA BavedDAryA… aBijIvetsa sarvezu lokezvapi purandarAt' (rA0 33418) aBijIvet=aByaDikaM jIvet
'yena yena viSezeRa karmaRA yena kena cit aByujjIvetsAdyamAnaH' (BA0 SAM0 14163) utkfzwam UrjasvalaM jIvedityarTaH
'svabAhubalamASritya yo'ByujjIvati mAnavaH' (BA0 u0 13345) ukto'rTaH
'dadO tasyE tadEvArDaM nijAyuzaH pratyujjijIva sA tena' (kaTA0 1481).. pratilabDajIvitA baBUvetyarTaH
'itaH pradAnamuta devA upajIvanti amutaH pradAnaM manuzyA upajIvanti' (tE0 saM0 3297) upajIvanti ASritya jIvanti saMSrayante
'etasyEvAnandasyAnyAni BUtAni mAtrAmupajIvanti' (bfha0 u0 4332) ukto'rTaH
'sujIvaM nityaSastasya yaH parErupajIvyate rAma tena tu durjIvaM yaH parAnupajIvati' (rA0 21057).. upajIvati upASritya jIvati
'idaM kavivarEH sarvErAKyAnamupajIvyate' (BA0 Adi0 289) upajIvyate ASrIyate
'manuzyAScopajIvanti yasya SilpaM mahAtmanaH' (hari0 1348) ukto'rTaH
'upajIvA sTopajIvyAsaM sarvamAyurjIvyAsam' (aTarva0 19692) upaSabdo'DikavacanaH upajIvA aDikajIvanavantaH
'sa nirBAjyaH svakAdaMSAt kiMYcid dattvopajIvanam' (manu0 9207) upajIvanaM lokayAtrArTaM Danam
